title: Basic JavaScript Proxy and Reflect
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Proxy and Reflect. Focus on implementing Proxy creation (target, handler) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Proxy and Reflect
description: Create a function that uses Proxy creation (target, handler) and Get and set traps together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Proxy and Reflect Project
description: Build a small application that applies Proxy creation (target, handler), Get and set traps, Has and deleteProperty traps in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Proxy and Reflect
description: The following code has bugs related to Proxy creation (target, handler). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Proxy and Reflect
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Proxy creation (target, handler) and Get and set traps.
